name: Improper Neutralization of Directives in Dynamically Evaluated Code ('Eval Injection')
description: The product receives input from an upstream component but does not neutralize code syntax before using it in a dynamic evaluation call (eval(), Function(), setTimeout with string), allowing attackers to inject and execute arbitrary code.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides user-controlled data that flows directly into a TRANSFORM[eval|Function|dynamic_exec] node performing dynamic code evaluation without a CONTROL node that validates or sanitizes the input to ensure it contains no executable directives
